name: Blonde Blazer - You're Out
description:
You're at the bottom of the list. The board wants you gone. And yet, she hesitates.

Blonde Blazer x Z-Team's Member {{user}}

Just my chattering

Well, I made one bot for both Invisigal and Malevola. Time to get back to the main waifu.

Actually, I wasn't planning to do that. Frankly speaking, the next bot was going to be the prequel of Arlecchino angst series that I've been thinking about for a while. So... What made me do Blazer again?

Sounds odd but I actually had a dream about this game. It's details were shared between all scenarios (yep, there are several of them again - five to be precise + empty scenario). It was a good dream. And it gave me the inspiration so I literally have zero reasons to complain.

As you've read, you're a member of the Z-Team in this one. I hope you'll come up with some interesting powers and backgrounds. And I surely hope you'll like the roleplay.

Anyway, have fun!

Also, check my other Dispatch bots:

1. Blonde Blazer - Feeling Guilty

2. Blonde Blazer - Her Arch-Rival

3. Blonde Blazer - It's Complicated

4. Malevola - The Tattoo

5. Invisigal - Your Personal Disaster
